Explicit Interface Implementations

ActiveTemplate

The name of the active item template associated with the raster type used for building the specified data source. A raster type that doesn't contain the matching template is not considered candidate. All other templates are disabled when building the data sour

virtual string ActiveTemplate { get; set; }

Returns

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

AllowAncillaryDatasets

Indicates whether ancillary dataset generated by complex raster type item templates are to be allowed by handler operations.

virtual bool AllowAncillaryDatasets { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

AllowBuilderItems

Indicates whether sensor raster types are used in the attempt to load the data source.

virtual bool AllowBuilderItems { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

AllowQuickOpen

Indicates whether an applicable data source (like a mosaic dataset item) loads with only basic information. Preventing it from connecting to pixel data (referenced by the underlying rasters in the function stack) can substantially improve performance of IRaste

virtual bool AllowQuickOpen { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

AllowRasterDatasets

Indicates whether an attempt is made to load the data source as a non-sensor-dataset: i.e., a regular raster dataset, a mosaic dataset or a raster catalog item, a web service or image service item URL.

virtual bool AllowRasterDatasets { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

DataSource

The data source to be supplied to handler operations.

virtual object DataSource { get; set; }

Returns

object

RasterTypeParameters

Override parameters injected into the raster types while contructing a function raster dataset from a data source.

virtual IPropertySet RasterTypeParameters { get; set; }

Returns

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

RasterTypes

The collection of raster types on which the handler operates.

virtual IArray RasterTypes { get; set; }

Returns

IArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

StopAtFirstFind

Indicates whether handler operations stops searching for candidate raster types or templates once the first candidate is found.

virtual bool StopAtFirstFind { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

TrackCancel

The cancel tracker associated with handler operations.

virtual ITrackCancel TrackCancel { get; set; }

Returns

ITrackCancel

Examples

Sample Snippet

TryQuickCheckOnly

Indicates whether handler operations perform only cursory checks (via IRasterBuilder.CanBuild) on data sources to identify candidate raster types and templates.

virtual bool TryQuickCheckOnly { get; set; }

Returns

bool
